### Free Shipping on Orders $115 and Up. Lower 48 States Only.

Effective Date: 9/9/25

The Rag Company is committed to shipping your order quickly, safely, and affordably. Please review the details of our shipping policy below.

 

Shipping Coverage

We currently ship only within the United States, including:

Alaska and Hawaii

State-side APO/FPO addresses

We do not ship internationally. If you are located outside the U.S., please visit our Distributor Page to find an authorized reseller in your region.

 

Processing Time

Most orders are processed and shipped within 48 hours of being received.

During peak sale times can extend the time it takes us to process the orders.

Orders are shipped Monday through Saturday (excluding holidays).

Delivery timeframes begin once the carrier picks up the order from our warehouse.

 

Shipping Rates

Flat Rate: $9.99 for orders under $115 (pre-tax, after discounts).

Free Shipping: Orders $115 and above (pre-tax, after discounts).

Rates are applied automatically at checkout.

 

Carriers & Methods

USPS Priority Mail (2–3 days) is our primary shipping method.

USPS Parcel Select or UPS may be used at our discretion if more cost-effective.

Shipping times vary by carrier and destination; we cannot guarantee specific delivery dates.

 

Tracking Information

A tracking number will be emailed once your order leaves our warehouse.

Please check your spam/junk folders if you do not see the email.

Incorrect or missing email addresses will prevent tracking updates.

 

Delivery & Liability

Most packages are delivered without requiring a signature. Drivers may leave packages at their discretion.

A “signature required” service is available by request for an additional fee.

Once a package is delivered to the shipping address provided, The Rag Company is not responsible for lost, stolen, or misdelivered packages.

Customers are responsible for providing accurate and complete shipping information at checkout.

 

Questions

If you have any questions about shipping or need assistance with your order, please contact us at support@theragcompany.com.

# iK Multi Pro 2 360

Sale price

$46.69

4.7

Quantity

Add to cart

This item is a recurring or deferred purchase. By continuing, I agree to the cancellation policy and authorize you to charge my payment method at the prices, frequency and dates listed on this page until my order is fulfilled or I cancel, if permitted. 

[
FULL CASE DISCOUNT
](https://theragcompany.com/products/ik-multi-pro-2-360-case)

The IK MULTI Pro 2 360º sprayer is engineered for top-tier performance, offering exceptional ergonomics, ease of use, and enhanced safety. Designed to deliver professional-grade spraying results, it is ideal for a wide range of applications, including construction, cleaning and disinfection, pest and virus control, automotive detailing, industrial maintenance, and HVAC servicing.

Built for maximum durability and chemical resistance, the IK MULTI Pro 2 is especially effective when working with aggressive substances, including highly acidic solutions. Its 360º spray functionality allows for consistent output at any angle—perfect for hard-to-reach areas and precise applications.

### Product Features

- Durable, translucent tank with built-in level indicator
- Ergonomic and innovative design for user comfort
- Wide, stable base for added support and balance
- Large opening for quick and easy filling
- Integrated safety lock for secure operation
- Built-in depressurization safety valve
- Protective sleeve around valve chamber for added durability
- Tool-free disassembly for easy cleaning and maintenance
- Color-coded caps for easy chemical identification
- Convenient nozzle storage inside colored caps
- Multiple spray pattern options to suit different applications

### Sprayer Care & Cleaning

- Always depressurize the sprayer and rinse with clean water after each use.
- Dispose of any remaining chemicals in accordance with local regulations.
- If the nozzle becomes blocked, rinse with water only—do not use metal objects to clear it.
- Remove and clean the handle filter with water if clogged.
- Store indoors in a cool, dry place—avoid freezing or extreme heat (ideal range: 5°C to 30°C).
- To extend the life of the seals, regularly lubricate moving parts with appropriate grease.

### Additional Information

- Dimensions: 5" Length × 0.75" Width
- Color Options: Red (Double Axe) & Green (Single Axe)
- Country of Origin: Japan

### Safety Information

- Always follow the manufacturer's instructions and recommended dosages on chemical product labels.
- Do not eat, drink, or smoke while preparing or using chemical products to prevent accidental ingestion.
- Never spray toward people, animals, electrical equipment, open flames, or any source of ignition.
- In the event of poisoning, seek medical attention immediately and bring the chemical packaging with you.
- Do not dispose of waste products or residues near water sources, wells, or other environmentally sensitive areas.
- Wear appropriate protective gear such as gloves, goggles, masks, and protective clothing to prevent contact with skin, eyes, or mouth.
- Read and understand the sprayer’s user manual before use.
- Do not modify the sprayer.
- Do not obstruct or strike the safety valve.
- Do not use the sprayer if it is damaged, deformed, or altered from its original design.
- Replace any damaged parts with official replacements—do not attempt repairs with makeshift parts.
- Keep out of reach of children.
- Use only with compatible substances.
- Use only original spare parts and accessories. The manufacturer is not responsible for damage caused by third-party components.
